original: 防空地下室结构构造要求见《07FG01》第53页~71页。
translated: The structural requirements for the air defense basement can be found on pages 53 to 71 of 07FG01.
Design Description of Civil Air Defense Structure:

original: 门框墙内所有预埋件、钢门框和铰页锚板，应位置准确，严格校正后方可与主筋焊牢，再浇筑混凝土。
translated: All embedded parts, steel door frames, and hinge anchor plates inside the door frame wall should be accurately positioned and strictly calibrated before being welded firmly to the main reinforcement before pouring concrete.

original: 钢门框预埋安装时必须铅直、周边平整，并在安装后门扇开启灵活。
translated: During the pre embedded installation of steel door frames, they must be vertical and have a flat perimeter, and the door leaf should be flexible to open after installation.

original: 注意预埋件的方向与门开启方向相对应，门框墙尺寸应满足预埋件设置要求。
translated: Pay attention to the direction of the embedded parts corresponding to the opening direction of the door, and the size of the door frame wall should meet the requirements for the installation of the embedded parts.

original: 门框墙受力钢筋伸入支座的锚固长度及其他构造见《07FG04》第4页。
translated: The anchorage length and other structures of the load-bearing steel bars of the door frame wall extending into the support can be found on page 4 of 07FG04.

original: 门洞四角当墙厚≤400时，应各配置2%%13116斜向钢筋，当墙厚＞400时，应各配置3%%13116斜向钢筋，其长度≥1100。
translated: When the wall thickness is ≤ 400, 2% 13116 diagonal steel bars should be installed at each corner of the door opening. When the wall thickness is>400, 3% 13116 diagonal steel bars should be installed at each corner, with a length of ≥ 1100.

original:
人防主要荷载如下：
顶板（qe1）：60kN/m2
外墙 (饱和土中)（qe2）：60kN/m2
底板（桩基）（qe3）：25 kN/m2
室外直通、单向出入口ξ<30处临空墙：160N/m2
室内出入口，室外竖井、楼梯、穿廊出入口处临空墙：130kN/m2
室外单向出入口处门框墙：270kN/m2
室内出入口，室外竖井、楼梯、穿廊出入口处门框墙（qe）：240 kN /m2
其他详见《FG01~05（2007年合订本）》第19~39页。
translated:
The main loads of civil air defense are as follows:
Top plate (qe1): 60kN/m2
Exterior wall (in saturated soil) (qe2): 60kN/m2
Base plate (pile foundation) (qe3): 25 kN/m2
Outdoor direct and one-way entrances and exits with ξ<30, facing the wall: 160N/m2
Indoor entrances and exits, outdoor vertical shafts, stairs, and corridor entrances and exits with overhanging walls: 130kN/m2
Door frame wall at outdoor one-way entrance and exit: 270kN/m2
Door frame walls (qe) at indoor entrances and exits, outdoor shafts, stairs, and corridor entrances and exits: 240 kN/m2
For other details, please refer to pages 19-39 of FG01-05 (2007 bound edition).
